UserPromptSubmit.description: Verify switchboard CLI is available and reactor is reachable
UserPromptSubmit.command: which switchboard >/dev/null 2>&1 && switchboard ping 2>&1 | head -1 || echo 'WARNING: switchboard CLI not found or reactor not reachable'
switchboard models list --format json 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'bai/' || switchboard introspect 2>&1

UserPromptSubmit.description: Detect the knowledge vault drive and provide context to skills
UserPromptSubmit.command: PROFILE=$(switchboard config show 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'{d.get(\"name\",\"unknown\")} -> {d.get(\"url\",\"unknown\")}')"); VAULT=$(switchboard drives list --format json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; drives=json.load(sys.stdin); matches=[d for d in drives if any(n.get('documentType')=='bai/vault-config' for n in d.get('state',{}).get('global',{}).get('nodes',[]))]; print(f'VAULT_DRIVE_SLUG={matches[0][\"slug\"]}') if matches else None; print(f'VAULT_DRIVE_ID={matches[0][\"id\"]}') if matches else None; print(f'VAULT_DRIVE_NAME={matches[0][\"name\"]}') if matches else print('WARNING: No knowledge vault drive found')" 2>/dev/null); echo "Profile: $PROFILE"; echo "$VAULT"
